docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DECKER, DAN AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, WILLIAM ALLEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02
